<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Actualizar configuración de validación"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/config/validation"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



<details>
<summary><strong>Permisos requeridos</strong></summary>

**Dashboard:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `config.manage`

**API Keys:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `config.api.manage`

</details>



Actualizar configuración de validación

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"liveness_check":{"type":"boolean"},"id_scan_check":{"type":"boolean"},"government_check":{"type":"boolean"},"ephemeral_transaction_data":{"type":"boolean"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Configuración de validación actualizada exitosamente","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"config":{"type":"object"}}}}}},"401":{"description":"Error de autenticación","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["type","title","status","detail"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","example":"authentication_error"},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Unauthorized"},"status":{"type":"integer","example":401},"detail":{"type":"string","example":"We could not authenticate your credentials. Please check the documentation at https://docs.soyio.id"}}}}}},"422":{"description":"Error de validación","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["type","title","status","errors"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","example":"validation_error"},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Validation error"},"status":{"type":"integer","example":422},"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"ValidationError"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
